name: meta-llama-3-8b
description: Base version of Llama 3, an 8 billion parameter language model from Meta.

length_penalty.description: A parameter that controls how long the outputs are. If < 1, the model will tend to generate shorter outputs, and > 1 will tend to generate longer outputs.
length_penalty.title: Length Penalty

max_new_tokens.description: This parameter has been renamed to max_tokens. max_new_tokens only exists for backwards compatibility purposes. We recommend you use max_tokens instead. Both may not be specified.
max_new_tokens.title: Max New Tokens

max_tokens.description: Maximum number of tokens to generate. A word is generally 2-3 tokens.
max_tokens.title: Max Tokens

min_new_tokens.description: This parameter has been renamed to min_tokens. min_new_tokens only exists for backwards compatibility purposes. We recommend you use min_tokens instead. Both may not be specified.
min_new_tokens.title: Min New Tokens

min_tokens.description: Minimum number of tokens to generate. To disable, set to -1. A word is generally 2-3 tokens.
min_tokens.title: Min Tokens

presence_penalty.description: A parameter that penalizes repeated tokens regardless of the number of appearances. As the value increases, the model will be less likely to repeat tokens in the output.
presence_penalty.title: Presence Penalty

prompt.description: Prompt to send to the model.
prompt.title: Prompt

prompt_template.description: Template for formatting the prompt. Can be an arbitrary string, but must contain the substring `{prompt}`.
prompt_template.title: Prompt Template

seed.description: Random seed. Leave blank to randomize the seed.
seed.title: Seed

stop_sequences.description: A comma-separated list of sequences to stop generation at. For example, '<end>,<stop>' will stop generation at the first instance of 'end' or '<stop>'.
stop_sequences.title: Stop Sequences

temperature.description: Adjusts randomness of outputs, greater than 1 is random and 0 is deterministic, 0.75 is a good starting value.
temperature.title: Temperature

top_k.description: When decoding text, samples from the top k most likely tokens; lower to ignore less likely tokens.
top_k.title: Top K

top_p.description: When decoding text, samples from the top p percentage of most likely tokens; lower to ignore less likely tokens.
top_p.title: Top P
